objective: Verify that preflight, denial, query, publication, pack, and import explanations remain structured, reconstructable, and non-prose-only.

cases.title: Authorization denial trace includes evaluated gates
cases.failureMode: Agent receives an AUTHORITY_DENIED without enough machine-readable context to display or remediate safely.
then: Trace includes actor, action class, grant/delegation context, revocation context, tenant boundary, and next actions.

assertions.statement: Authorization trace is structured and not prose-only.

cases.title: Query explanation includes basis/freshness/redaction
cases.failureMode: Dashboard cannot tell whether the result is complete, stale, redacted, or derived.
then: Trace identifies source basis, materialization basis, freshness posture, redaction/permission reasons, and evidence posture.

assertions.statement: Query explain supports safe display decisions.

cases.title: Publication refusal trace includes basis gaps
cases.failureMode: Compliance output refusal is opaque, causing agents to fabricate missing evidence.
then: Trace identifies stale/disputed/missing evidence basis and safe remediation without exposing redacted data.

cases.title: Pack conflict trace identifies proposed mutation
cases.failureMode: Pack activation conflict does not tell which core meaning would change.
then: Trace maps conflict to exact pack element, protected OFARM concept, and rejection/remediation.

assertions.statement: Pack conflict trace is actionable and audit-safe.

cases.title: Import trace shows source fidelity and loss map
cases.failureMode: Adapter outcome hides what was dropped, inferred, or unresolved.
then: Trace shows source payload refs, parsed candidates, loss map, unresolved identity/unit/timezone assumptions, and promotion eligibility.

assertions.statement: Import trace prevents silent source-fidelity loss.

acceptanceCriteria: Each trace references gates, reason codes, source/basis refs, and safe next actions.
